markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Q4 performance and align on the 2026 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Pivot:** Shifting from use case guides to programmatic SEO (PSEO) to capture middle-funnel intent (e.g., "how to build X in Webflow"), linking to existing integration pages and new code components.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [**PSEO Content Debate:** Webflow prefers authentic, product-grounded content over "SEO slop" (e.g., listicles). GrowthX will provide data showing that programmatic content, while less authentic, is effective for winning AI answer engine optimization (AEO).](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [**Code Component Plan:** The initial 100 components will be unstyled primitives (e.g., buttons, sliders) that inherit a user's design system via exposed props, requiring a `README` for each component to guide setup.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
  - [**Scope & Renewal:** The PSEO pivot fits the current contract by reallocating capacity from integration pages. Top-of-funnel educational content is a potential add-on for the renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)

## Topics

### Q4 Performance & Strategy Pivot

  - [**Integration Pages:** High-performing workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [**Status:** \~600 of \~700 pages published.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - **Results:** 28 \#1 keywords, 105 first-page keywords.
  - [**Use Case Guides:** Underperforming workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**Status:** \~20 published; scaling to 5/week.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**Results:** Low clicks despite rising impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**2026 Proposal:** Pivot capacity from use case guides to PSEO.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [**Workstreams:**](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
        1.  [**Integration Pages:** Maintain & optimize.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
        2.  [**Programmatic SEO (PSEO):** New focus.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
        3.  [**Code Components:** New workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### Programmatic SEO (PSEO) Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Capture middle-funnel intent (e.g., "how to build a database in Webflow").](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Funnel:** PSEO → Integration Pages → Code Components/Dev Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [**Webflow Concern:** Avoid "SEO slop" (e.g., listicles) to maintain brand authenticity.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [**GrowthX Rationale:** Programmatic content is effective for winning AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Decision:** GrowthX will present data to inform a joint strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

### Code Component Execution Plan

  - [**Priority:** Start with unstyled primitives (e.g., buttons, sliders) to prove the system, then add complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
  - [**Styling:** Components will be unstyled to ensure they inherit a user's design system.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=2462.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** Expose props for users to connect their own variables (e.g., `buttonText` prop connects to a site's primary text color variable).](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=2749.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Each component needs a `README` explaining its props and how to connect them.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=2890.0)
  - [**Development:**](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=3168.0)
      - [**Repo:** Use the `Webflow examples` GitHub repo.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=3168.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Fork the repo for development, then merge approved components into the main branch.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=3333.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Liz):**](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
      - [Write a strategic proposal detailing the PSEO pivot and top-of-funnel opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up meeting on scoping and contract renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
      - [Schedule a topic-generation meeting for late February.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
  - [**Webflow (Colin):**](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=2853.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with a Loom video and dev docs explaining the prop-based styling workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=2853.0)
      - [Poll internal teams for high-priority component ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=3099.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Kirkland):**](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=3090.0)
      - [Begin code component development after receiving Webflow's documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/GwsrTZHnsFY8tfukG5Sm-u7gsf-mbzzC?tab=summary&timestamp=3090.0)
